ratings.comment: The course is beneficial. It involves advanced research topics but is delivered in a way easy to understand for the students. Prof. Cape is nice and gives good grades.
I paid $6,400 just to listen to this man read directly from the textbook. If I learned one thing from this class it is that you need absolutely zero teaching skills to teach a class.
That's how I become a part of Jihadi
He just copy and read the book in his lecture without any clear examples. The textbook is also bullshit. Don't waste your time and money on him.
